raw_cv_text:
Bernice Fisher
(415) 623-8947 | bernice.fisher@gmail.com | https://github.com/bernicefisher
EDUCATION
University of Washington | B.S. Computer Science 2012 - 2015
Coursework in distributed systems, database design, and performance optimization
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Staff Platform Engineer Aug 2021 - Present
Architected multi-region Kubernetes infrastructure supporting 40+ internal services, reducing deployment latency by 65%
and enabling zero-downtime updates for 500+ daily deployments across 8 teams.
Led cross-functional initiative to migrate observability stack from Datadog to open-source Prometheus/Grafana, cutting
annual monitoring costs by $2.3M while improving MTTR from 45 to 12 minutes.
Mentored 7 junior and mid-level engineers on platform reliability patterns, conducting weekly deep-dives on distributed
systems that influenced architecture decisions across Payment Orchestration and Risk teams.
Uber | Senior Platform Engineer Mar 2019 - Jul 2021
Designed and operationalized service mesh control plane (Envoy-based) handling 120K+ RPS across ride-sharing and
delivery platforms, achieving 99.99% availability and reducing inter-service latency variance by 40%.
Established platform standards for CI/CD pipelines that reduced average build times from 25 to 8 minutes for 200+
microservices, improving developer productivity and enabling 10x increase in deployment frequency.
Drove database connection pooling optimization reducing connection churn by 89%, preventing 3 major production
incidents and saving $1.8M annually in cloud infrastructure costs.
Databricks | Lead Infrastructure Engineer Jun 2017 - Feb 2019
Owned platform reliability SLOs across all compute clusters, implementing predictive autoscaling that reduced emergency
scaling events by 72% and improved query performance consistency by 55% for 500+ enterprise customers.
Architected internal developer platform (IDP) abstractions enabling self-service infrastructure provisioning, reducing
time-to-deployment for data pipeline teams from 2 weeks to 2 hours.
Resolved critical etcd corruption incident affecting 15 clusters affecting 50K+ nodes by implementing automated
consensus recovery tooling, preventing future incidents and reducing MTBF from 6 months to 24 months.
Square | Senior Platform Engineer Jan 2015 - May 2017
Migrated monolithic payment processor to event-driven architecture across 6 services, achieving 3x throughput increase
(from 8K to 24K TPS) and improving system resilience during peak transaction volumes.
Designed and implemented chaos engineering framework that proactively identified 23 production failure scenarios,
leading 12 reliability improvements across core payment path before affecting customers.
Led quarterly platform engineering guild meetings for 45+ backend engineers, establishing best practices for rate-limiting,
circuit breakers, and health checks that prevented 6 major outages.
PROJECTS
Platform Standardization Initiative | Kubernetes, Helm, Argo Workflows, CNCF tools 2022 - 2023
Established organization-wide platform standards and golden paths reducing team onboarding time by 60% and enabling
consistent observability across 120+ services.
Created reusable Helm charts and Terraform modules adopted by 18 teams, standardizing infrastructure-as-code practices
and reducing configuration drift incidents by 94%.
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) | Technical Advisory Board Contributor 2021 - Present
Contributed to Kubernetes community working groups, providing platform engineering perspective on API design
decisions reviewed by 50+ maintainers.
Authored white paper on platform engineering maturity models downloaded 8K+ times, establishing thought leadership in
infrastructure reliability space.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, Java, Bash, SQL
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, Envoy, Istio, etcd, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, Elasticsearch, Apache Kafka, Protocol
Buffers, gRPC
Tools – Terraform, Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty, ArgoCD, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ELK Stack, Vault
name: Bernice Fisher

projects.name: Platform Standardization Initiative
projects.subtitle: Kubernetes, Helm, Argo Workflows, CNCF tools
